topic: Pregnancy reduces brain volume — and rebuilds it stronger
caption: Did you know pregnancy can temporarily shrink your brain? 🧠💡 But here's the amazing part: it rebuilds stronger! 💪🏼 Research shows that pregnancy reduces brain volume due to hormonal changes, but this reduction is followed by a rebuilding process that makes the brain more resilient. 🌈 Learn how this process works and what it means for new moms. 👶🏼 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future self will thank you! 💕 #pregnancybrain #newmom #brainhealth #hormonalchanges #resilience
